article.title: Cyberreality: Industrial, Ambient, and Electronic Sound Design
article.subtitle: A profile of an artist working across textured noise constructions and spatial sound design.
article.author: L. Nakamura
article.excerpt: Cyberreality operates within industrial, ambient, and electronic production, crafting textured noise constructions and spatial sound design. Their work is situated within a broader experimental electronic network.

content.text: Cyberreality is an artist whose work spans industrial, ambient, and electronic production. Their output is characterized by textured noise constructions and spatial sound design, situating them within a broader experimental electronic network.

The artist has released several albums including CYBERROR, r e c u e r d o, and Internet Dating 1.5. Their discography also includes CYBERROR (Remixes) and a compilation appearance on Selected Juke Werkz, Vol. 1.

Cyberreality's approach to sound design emphasizes spatial qualities and layered noise textures. Their work demonstrates a clear focus on experimental electronic composition and production techniques.

The artist's recent releases include CYBERROR (Remixes) from 2022, r e c u e r d o from early 2022, and the original CYBERROR album from mid-2021. Earlier work such as Internet Dating 1.5 dates back to late 2020.

While Cyberreality's work is primarily solo, their inclusion on compilations like Selected Juke Werkz, Vol. 1 indicates engagement with a wider experimental electronic scene. The artist is currently not closely associated with any specific similar acts.
